race.comment: GOLDEN STRAAND (2) bounced off the two good trials first-up with a dominant win from back in the field over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Has the upside to go through his grades this time in. Tempo suits and can finish over the top of them. SWEETHEARTED (3) snagged back early from the outside draw and took good late ground off GOLDEN STRAAND when second over 1100m at Warwick Farm. Gets the better set-up today and can turn the tables with the claim at the good each way price. WANARUAH (4) Group placed entire who returns from a long layoff. Fitted with the two solid trials with the blinkers staying on and the tongue-tie coming off. Can surprise fresh from the low draw. HEZDARNHOTTOO (6) going better than his form suggests. Deep into the campaign and not to be overlooked at the good odds. COUPLES RETREAT (14) capable on her day and resumes with the slick 1000m trial win at Muswellbrook. Respect.
